Defendants Corporation Of The Fine Arts Museum Notice And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions, Set One Be Deemed Admitted And To Compel Responses To Discovery And For Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions On Plaintiff M. Joiyah
Off Calendar Jun-05-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - Defendant The Fine Arts Museums Foundation's Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions, Set One Be Deemed Admitted And To Compel Responses To Discovery And For Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions On Plaintiff M. Joiyah is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2026 Set For Trial On Jan-11-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs THE CORPORATION OF THE FINE ARTS MUSEUMS,and THE FINE ARTS MUSEUMS FOUNDATION DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendants The Corporation of the Fine Arts Museums ("COFAM") and The Fine Arts Museums Foundation ("Foundation")'s demurrer to Plaintiff M. Joiyah's complaint is OVERRULED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
